title: Masjidal 10" Digital Azan Clock, WiFi, Dynamic Touchscreen, Worldwide Prayer Times, Full Quran Player, Islamic Art, Streaming Halal Muslim Content Including Duas, Dhikr, Hadith, Verse of the Day, Blk
features: A MODERN ATHAN CLOCK: The Masjidal Athan Frame is the most advanced azan table or wall clock ever created with perfectly accurate prayer times and always-on cloud connectivity via your home's WiFi connection.

NEVER MISS A PRAYER: With beautiful audio & visual countdowns for every prayer and multiple pre-loaded adhans to choose from, you're namaz prayers will always be timely--you can even load your own recorded athan!

GORGEOUS DYNAMIC SCREEN: Our azaan screen is packed with the latest technology resulting in a booming Islamic call to prayer that fills your home and a pixel-perfect screen that shows inspiring Islamic art on rotation.

THE ESSENTIAL ISLAMIC DEVICE: Includes the full Quran with dozens of reciters along with a powerful scheduler so you can have Surah Al-Kahf play every Friday, for example, or even set times for morning and evening Adhkars.

STREAMING ISLAMIC CONTENT: The Athan Frame also displays your local weather, prayer and iqamah timings from many Masjids/Mosques, stories of the Prophets, Islamic Radio, children's bedtime stories, Makkah streaming, and more!
description: Product Description Option to sync with your local masjid for athan and Iqamah times Option to choose athan time based on location Option to activate Tahajjud Athan Majidal Athan Frame The Next Generation Athan Clock The perfect Athan Clock has finally arrived. No excuse to neglect or miss a prayer with the athan for each of the five daily prayers. A visual 30-minute countdown before the start of next prayer. Loaded with multiple athans, dhikr reminders, daily Quran verse, duas and hadith. Vast library of audio content including Quran, bedtime stories, adhkars, Islamic radio in multiple languages and more. Content is selected and scheduled to reflect the Islamic calendar and significant Islamic dates. Touchscreen, WIFI, Cloud-based, and Bluetooth Audio and Video Streaming Advanced Audio scheduler Gregorian and Hijri (Islamic calendar) Weather with option to access weather related supplications Content by significant Islamic dates Content is selected and scheduled to reflect the Islamic calendar and significant Islamic dates Islamic holiday reminders Duas, hadith, and quranic verses complement the Islamic calendar Beautiful rotating Islamic screens Dynamic touchscreen display Visually stunning screens display Islamic background Artwork and background updated to reflect significant Islamic months and days Daily dhikr reminders Perfect for tables, desk, or counters Perfect for tables, desks, counters Option for wall mount sold separately Available in three convenient sizes 14-inch screen 10-inch screen 8-inch screen
